task: Interpolate y values at new x points using xp (ascending) and fp
clarification_query: Must xp in np.interp be in ascending order, and should fp be reversed to match?
clarification_options: xp must be ascending; fp must match xp order (no reversal)
both can be in any order
expected_user_response: xp must be ascending; fp must match xp order (no reversal)
explanation: np.interp requires xp in ascending order. fp must correspond element-wise to xp — reversing fp would pair each x with the wrong y.
